overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban district at night. The scene transitions from a plaza with large digital billboards through narrow alleys and outdoor dining areas to a main street with bars and ascending stairs.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, dominated by a massive pink digital billboard overhead. The camera moves forward past orange benches where NPCs are seated, with a distinctive character in red standing near the center. The environment features smooth concrete surfaces and neon accent lighting on the building facades.

events.description: entering narrow alleyway from open plaza

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow passage with neon signage

notable_agents.action: standing against wall wearing orange hoodie, looking at device

entered.detail: circular neon sign with Japanese characters and ramen bowl illustration
narrow passage between tall buildings with overhead structures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow alleyway between commercial buildings, marked by a prominent circular ramen neon sign on the left. The passage is enclosed with overhead structures blocking the sky. An NPC in an orange hoodie stands against the right wall as the camera moves forward toward an opening with outdoor seating visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with bar seating

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open outdoor dining plaza
turning slightly right toward the street

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor dining area with white umbrellas and bar seating

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the street, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: long bar with purple neon underlighting and traditional Japanese lanterns
large white patio umbrellas over dining tables
distinctive orange paved street visible beyond the dining area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into an outdoor dining area featuring a bar with purple neon lighting and white patio umbrellas. Patrons sit at tables while the camera moves toward an orange-paved street. The transition from enclosed alley to open plaza creates a shift in spatial feel, with the Dandelion bar sign becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bars and digital advertising

events.description: entering main commercial street with vehicle traffic
futuristic red vehicle passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the pedestrian walkway past the Dandelion Cocktails bar

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving along the orange-paved road

entered.detail: large illuminated orange sign for Dandelion Cocktails bar with multiple levels
tall buildings covered with multiple digital advertising screens
sleek red and yellow sports cars driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a main commercial street dominated by the Dandelion Cocktails bar with its prominent orange signage. Futuristic vehicles drive along the orange-paved road while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. Tall buildings covered in digital billboards line the street, creating a dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere. The camera continues forward, passing under the bar's overhang.

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs leading to an upper level entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
curved metal handrails along the stairway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, leading to an upper level of the Dandelion bar. The perspective shifts upward, showing the underside of the building's overhang and the continuation of neon lighting. The street level with its vehicles and pedestrians falls away below as the ascent continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic district, transitioning from a wide urban plaza into narrow corridors before ascending toward an elevated bar. It begins in an open plaza dominated by a massive pink digital billboard and orange benches, moving forward past pedestrians across smooth concrete surfaces. As the camera enters a narrow alleyway, the space becomes enclosed under overhead structures and marked by a circular ramen sign, before emerging into an outdoor dining area with purple neon lighting and white patio umbrellas. The scene then expands onto a main commercial street paved in orange, where futuristic vehicles drive past the prominent signage of the Dandelion Cocktails bar. Finally, the camera turns upward to ascend a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, leaving the bustling street level behind as it climbs toward the building's upper level.
